scripts.dev:backend: concurrently "npm run dev:identity" "npm run dev:finance" "npm run dev:procurement" "npm run dev:document" "npm run dev:ai"
scripts.build:backend: npm run build -w @procurement/types && npm run build -w @procurement/common && npm run build -w @procurement/utils && npm run build -w @procurement/middleware && npm run build -w @procurement/identity-service && npm run build -w @procurement/procurement-service && npm run build -w @procurement/finance-service && npm run build -w @procurement/document-service && npm run build -w @procurement/ai-service
scripts.build: npm run build:backend && npm run build:frontend
scripts.clean:backend: npm run clean -w @procurement/types && npm run clean -w @procurement/common && npm run clean -w @procurement/utils && npm run clean -w @procurement/middleware && npm run clean -w @procurement/identity-service && npm run clean -w @procurement/procurement-service && npm run clean -w @procurement/finance-service && npm run clean -w @procurement/document-service && npm run clean -w @procurement/ai-service
